headline: A Look At American International Group (AIG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Recent performance context for American International Group stock American International Group (AIG) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up around 5% over the past week and about 4% over the past month, despite a negative year to date return. See our latest analysis for American International Group.
